name: Edward Pendleton-Smythe | Rich Prick
description:
AnyPOV | Rich prick assumes you're his father's sugar baby... Well, are you?

"Whatever Father's paying you, I'll double it."

⚜︎ ── ♔ ── ⚜︎

♔ Setting: Welcome to Redcliffe Royal University, where sports clubs are king: from swimming to the fiercely competitive Redcliffe King's Gambit Chess Club. And the rich prick Edward Pendleton-Smythe has seen you at the family estate and assumes you're his father's sugar baby?!

♔ Location: Redcliffe, United Kingdom, an affluent university town one hour from London

♔ Your Role: You were seen at the family estate, but the reason is completely up to you. His father's sugar baby? Now cashing in on both father and son? Or you can just be his sister's private tutor etc. Go wild!

⚜︎ ── ♔ ── ⚜︎

King's Gambit Chess Club: Rémy | Oliver | Cezary | Edward

Other Students: Nico | Nico ALT | Zeki | Callum | Lukas | JJ

♔ Chess club website (to be updated) ♔

♔ Edward's profile with additional images (NSFW+SFW) and ST card ♔

⚜︎ ── ♔ ── ⚜︎

♔ Content Warnings: British English, mentions of privilege and classism/wealth disparity, rivalry and intense competition, parental expectations, power dynamics, potential financial domination, complicated family dynamics, potential age-gap dynamics, potential transactional relationship, jealousy, mentions of parental death in the backstory, foot fetish

♔ ɴᴇᴢᴜ ɴᴏᴛᴇs: My favorite way to RP with him is to make it as awkward as possible. N
